nasb.text: What is man that You take thought of him, And the son of man that You care for him?

esv.text: what is man that you are mindful of him, and the son of man that you care for him?

cnv.text: 啊！人算甚麼，你竟記念他？ 世人算甚麼，你竟眷顧他？

ccb.text: 人算什么，你竟顾念他！ 世人算什么，你竟眷顾他！

csbs.text: 啊，人算什么，你竟顾念他！ 世人算什么，你竟眷顾他！
